description: He was obviously using some sort of cheat menu as he was able to eliminate our whole team while we were in the spawn in under 5 seconds of the action phase. I sent 2 clips of multiple individuals who i suspect who are using a cheat client, as you can see in the first clip you can see no recoil matched with some sort of legitbot or aimbot. In the second clip you can see vigil running out of the building and eliminating our entire team in under 5 seconds and in the kill cam u can see him locking onto our heads and tracing us through walls. Lastly if u look at the match replay you can see vigil in the 1st round sprinting backwards which is an indicator that he is using run and shoot or speed modifiers to alter his movement in game.
